posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Applying is as easy as pie with our automated interview process powered by Make.com and Monday.com! Here’s your step-by-step guide to kickstart your journey with us:

We’re thrilled to announce that we’ve streamlined our interview process to make it easier and more efficient for you. Here’s how it works:

Apply Through Our Website: Simply visit our website and fill out the candidate form. Once you hit submit, your information will be automatically added to our Monday board.

Instant Notification: Our HR team will receive an email notification as soon as your application is submitted.

HR Verification: After a quick review, our HR team will press a button to select you for the interview. You’ll receive a message instantly, informing you that you’ve been selected for the first-level interview.

Schedule Your Interview: You’ll have the option to choose between an online or offline interview. If you select the online interview, you’ll be directed to choose a time slot that works best for you. Your chosen time slot will be automatically communicated to our HR team via Teams.

Confirmation: Once your interview time is confirmed by our HR team, you’ll receive another email confirming the scheduled interview time along with a Google Meet link for the online interview.

Stay Updated: If you opt for an offline interview, you’ll receive an email confirming the interview details for the next working day.

#MSquareAutomation #InterviewProcess #CareerOpportunity
